title: Lodha Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lodha Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
